key_issues: N4 (Minor/cosmetic, non-blocking): Flow F4's notification enumeration ('list-changed, logging, progress, cancel') omits resources/updated, which now has its own flow F9; could read as exhaustive. Optionally cross-reference F9.

S4 (Suggestion, non-blocking): Consider a one-line note that pagination cursors are opaque and only valid against the same server/session - arguably an implementation detail fine to defer to the roadmap.

prior_issues_resolved.J1_resource_update_notifications: resolved - M12b resource-updated emitter + per-session subscription table; flow F9; new coverage row; closes Success Criterion 9.4
prior_issues_resolved.J2_pagination_cursors: resolved - M12b produces nextCursor across tools/resources/prompts/resources-templates list; M13 consumes/follows; flow F10; method name resources/templates/list verified against TS checkout
prior_issues_resolved.J3_batch_inconsistency: resolved by removal - both target spec revisions dropped JSON-RPC batch; independently confirmed no batch/JSONRPCBatch/isJSONRPCBatch in typescript-sdk/packages/core/src; M1 envelope list updated
prior_issues_resolved.N1_facade_strategy: resolved - normalized-superset facade, version-gated present-or-absent fields, refuses to emit fields absent from negotiated revision, preserves wire parity
prior_issues_resolved.N2_resumption_token_interface: resolved - M8 mandates mint-token-per-SSE-event + validate/replay-on-reconnect as fixed obligation; only storage backend deferred
prior_issues_resolved.N3_m12_bundling: resolved - split into M12a/M12b/M12c with separability and roadmap sequencing note in section 5
prior_issues_resolved.S1_composition_invariant: addressed - stated as hard invariant in 4.1
prior_issues_resolved.S2_ping_keepalive: addressed - M12a answers ping + owns protocol-utility handlers; M13 issues ping
prior_issues_resolved.S3_logging_level_filtering: addressed - M12b applies per-session level filter set via logging/setLevel owned by M12a

criteria_verification.all_vision_requirements_covered: yes - primitive-level gaps closed (subscriptions both sides, pagination both sides, batch removed with spec evidence); 3.4 carries explicit rows
criteria_verification.interfaces_sufficient_granularity: yes - new obligations expressed as interface responsibilities with internal/external split; 3.3 updated
criteria_verification.no_implementation_details_enforced: yes - new obligations describe what is guaranteed not how; storage/table/provider remain deferred in section 5; line-9 disclaimer holds
criteria_verification.tech_stack_consistent: yes - section 4 unchanged and still matches vision 5.1 row-for-row; no new tech introduced
